meta.intent: Pressure the player to choose between urgent rescue progress and dock cleanup without making either concern feel separate from the rescue route.
meta.expectedPath: Spend one costly lower rescue clear, stabilize with a planned triple or near-triple, then finish the urgent target before pivoting to the upper route.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player overprotects the dock and loses water tempo, or overcommits to rescue clears and overflows before the lower puppy is safe.
meta.whatItProves: A dock-pressure board can still be about rescue order when the safe dock move and urgent route move must be sequenced.
meta.notes: Role: pressure. The board intentionally stays fully occupied to make every early clear a dock-pressure choice; the flooded bottom row supplies the hazard edge while the small ice reveal adds route value without becoming a new lesson. Vine growth is disabled for this dock-focused beat.
